condition.description: Defines an IAM condition that must be met for the binding to apply, specifying attributes like title, description, and expression.

instance.description: Specifies the Bigtable instance to which the IAM binding will be applied.

members.description: List of IAM members to bind to the specified role, such as user accounts, service accounts, or groups.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to members for the Bigtable instance.
